### I. | SYSTEM-BASED OUTPUT FORMATS

Each project or identity produces outputs across multiple dimensions:
- Creative Artifact (audience-facing art)
- Research Proof (academic or archival)
- Product Utility (tools/templates/services)
- Marketable Pitch (for funding, licensing, public interfacing)
